free_text: Optical-model analysis of alpha-particle scattering by
Targets were prepared by evaporating natural calcium
metal onto thin carbon backings.Four targets were used
which varied in thickness from 40 to 80 mu-g/cm**2.
Sixteen surface-barrier detectors placed in a
multiple detector array at 10 degree intervals
* 1.5% for errors in making the dead-time corrections.
Because of the large variation in the magnitude of the
differential cross sections there is a large variation
of the statistical cotribution to the error for each
point. The error on a cross section of 1 mb/sr is 3%.
